extension_name.description: The display name for the extension.

extension_description.message: Pick colors with native macOS color sampler. Runs only when you click.
extension_description.description: Description of what the extension does.

pick_color_menu_title.description: Context menu item title to start color picking mode.

text_style_menu_title.description: Context menu item title to inspect selected text style.

popup_pick_color.description: Button label in popup to start picking a color.

popup_recent_colors.description: Section title for recent color list.

popup_no_colors.description: Empty state text for color history list.

popup_github_repo.description: Small footer link label in popup for opening repository page.

popup_general_picker.description: Small button label in popup to open native color chooser.

popup_selected_text_style.description: Section title for selected text style inspector.

popup_inspect_selected_text.description: Button label to inspect style values of selected text.

popup_no_selected_text.description: Placeholder text when no page text is selected yet.
